name: Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4
author: Poki
description: In Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 you play as a dentist who is down on his luck. He's penniless, a hundred gold coins in debt and has a very sick brother to take care of. The time to pay the debt is coming up, but his work as a dentist hasn't payed enough. With nothing else to turn to, he finds a way out in a wardrobe he received from a late cousin. It holds a dark secret that can solve all his problems, but at a terrible price... Solve the puzzles in your office, help your patients and unravel the dark secret of the Wardrobe. Do you have the sharp mind and steel nerves needed to solve this scary mystery? How to play Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4? Use the mouse to move around your office and solve the puzzles! Who created Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 is created by FM Studio. Play their other games from the Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe series on Poki: Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 2 and Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 3 How can I play Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 for free? You can play Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 for free on Poki. Can I play Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 on mobile devices and desktop? Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
